CustomField.formula: if( Sales_Order_Line_Item__c != null,((Sales_Order_Line_Item__r.Base_Price__c - Sales_Order_Line_Item__r.Discount_Amount__c) * (Tax_Code__r.Tax_Rate__c)), if( Purchase_Line_Items__c != null,(( Purchase_Line_Items__r.Total_Price__c * Tax_Code__r.Tax_Rate__c) /100), if( Employee_Pay__c != null,Employee_Pay__r.Tax_Amount__c+ Employee_Pay__r.Other_Tax_Amount__c ,0)))
CustomField.label: Tax
